response.justification: Bogdan has relevant backend and distributed-systems experience, including event-driven architectures and real-time data processing, which aligns with key requirements. However, his lack of direct exposure to fintech infrastructure, agentic AI systems in production, or scaling engineering teams to 30+ people significantly reduces his fit. His recent work with AI-agent infrastructure is promising but lacks depth in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq)
Proven ability to work across full tech stack and languages (TypeScript, DLang, JavaScript, etc.)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or payment flows
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams or leading technical leadership layers
No clear track record operating AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
